name: Thai Chicken with Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut bell pepper into short thin strips.
2. Combine boneless chicken and soy sauce in a shallow bowl; set aside.
3. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat.
4. Add rice and garlic to the skillet; cook and stir for 1 minute.
5. Stir in stock, peanut butter, and pepper flakes.
6. Bring to a boil, stirring until the peanut butter is melted.
7. Place chicken over the rice mixture, adding soy sauce to the skillet.
8. Reduce heat. Simmer until 5 minutes before the end of cooking time on the rice package.
9. Stir in snow peas and ginger; sprinkle with pepper strips.
10. Remove from heat. Let stand, covered, until all liquid is absorbed, about 5 minutes.
11. Sprinkle with peanuts.
